sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92682" key="r(ombi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥομβ-ίζω</orth>,= <sense id="n92682.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ῥομβέω, εἴ σε κλωστὴρ Μοιρέων ἐρόμβισεν</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Mélanges Nicole</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0383.tlg001:308" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">308</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Panticapaeum</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
